title: Static Between Stations - Interference and Doubt Arc Ambience
prompt: Story: Static Between Stations (static-between-stations) | Hook: A dead rail line broadcasts private confessions in the players' own voices. | Subgenre: psychological horror | Tone: CINEMATIC | Location: Abandoned commuter rail control annex | Villain: The Curator of Static | Villain worldview: Truth is only what survives the loudest channel. | Motifs: radio hiss, clock hands, platform chimes. Arc focus: Interference and Doubt. Compose original ambience that mirrors arc tension and supports long-session listening fatigue constraints.
negativePrompt: Avoid clipping, avoid muddy low-end, avoid unintelligible dialogue, avoid abrupt loudness spikes, avoid copyrighted melodic references.
